## Sample context

> The city's best blacksmiths and armorers, organized under the standard Master / Wardens / Court of Assistants framework. Tor-keg keeps the Court conservative, but the membership includes restless innovators — Dammon…
> His harder problem is that the Company's most famous member is barely a member at all. **Dammon at the Forge of the Nine** runs his own infernal-iron salvage program, has put out a public call for Hell-damaged armor…
> The city's most skilled alchemists, apothecaries, and (off the books) poisoners. Master / Wardens / Court of Assistants framework, with an unusually paranoid security culture under Droog. Apprentices are kept on long,…
